footer.tagline: Helping shrimp operators doing $200K–$2M/year find the exact leaks costing them their margin — and fix them.
footer.descriptor: Aquaculture consulting · Business growth · Farm audits

hero.headline: Your farm is losing margin for reasons you haven't identified yet.
hero.body: FCR running above target. Cycles finishing below forecast. Margins that feel thinner than your yields should allow. You're not making bad decisions — you're making decisions without the diagnostic lens that would show you what's actually happening. I know this pattern. These tools give you that lens.

diagnosticTeaser.headline: What score would your farm get?
diagnosticTeaser.body: Six questions. Two minutes. A personalised Farm Health Score across five operational dimensions — plus an estimated monthly revenue leak with a specific action plan to close it.
diagnosticTeaser.note: Based on benchmarks from 50+ farms audited across 15 countries.
diagnosticTeaser.scorecardNote: Complete the diagnostic to unlock your results

benchmarkPreview.topHalf: You are in the top half of audited farms
benchmarkPreview.sectionHeadline: How does your farm rank against the benchmark?
benchmarkPreview.sectionBody1: Move the slider to your current FCR. See in real time where you sit against 50+ audited operations. The full tool covers FCR, survival rate, and cost per kilogram.
benchmarkPreview.sectionBody2: Each metric shows your percentile rank, a colour-coded status, and the highest-ROI resource to close the gap.

inactionClock.note: Based on 40% efficiency gap: FCR waste, invisible mortality, disease risk, and energy losses vs benchmark.

profitabilityCalc.headline: Margin Recovery Calculator
profitabilityCalc.body: A 0.2 improvement in FCR can recover hundreds of thousands in lost margin. See what's possible for your operation.
profitabilityCalc.resultNote: Estimated margin recovered by optimizing FCR to {{targetFcr}}.

libraryFeature.headline: Access the Aquaculture Resources Library
libraryFeature.body: A curated collection of the databases, journals, and technical guides that serious operators actually use. Curated from 30 years of field work across 15 countries.

philosophy.headline: Most farms aren't failing because of bad biology. They're failing because of bad information at the wrong time.
philosophy.body1: I've worked on farms where the shrimp were healthy, the water was clean, and the operation still lost money — because no one was tracking FCR drift, or the harvest timing was two weeks off, or the stocking density had crept above what the aeration could sustain.
philosophy.body2: The failures I see consistently aren't catastrophic. They're structural. Small misalignments that compound quietly until the damage is visible and expensive. These resources exist to surface those misalignments early — before they become the reason a season fails.
philosophy.imgAlt: Hazem leading a group farm visit — consulting at shrimp ponds

valuationTeaser.headline: What would your farm sell for today — and after the programme?
valuationTeaser.body1: Move the slider to your revenue. The tool calculates your current investor valuation and the value the 90-Day Transformation Programme would unlock — using the same EBITDA-multiple methodology Hazem uses in Tier 3 due diligence.
valuationTeaser.body2: The full tool includes margin, documentation quality, and years in operation.

emailCapture.headline: Two guides. Download either — or both.
emailCapture.body: No newsletter padding. No recycled content. Working documents from the field — free via Lemon Squeezy, delivered to your inbox immediately.

consultationBanner.headline: If the guides are the map, this is someone who reads it with you.
consultationBanner.body: Bring your most pressing operational or investment question. One focused session, a specific action in writing within 24 hours, and nothing to sign beyond the booking. Used by farm operators and investors across the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and Africa.
consultationBanner.ctaProgram: Want a full transformation? See the 90-Day Farm Programme →

thankYou.seoTitle: Thank You — Your Order is Confirmed
thankYou.seoDesc: Your aquaculture resource is on its way. Check your inbox for the download link.
thankYou.title: Thank you for your purchase
thankYou.body: Your PDF has been delivered to your email by Lemon Squeezy. Check your inbox — it should arrive within a minute. Check your spam folder if it does not appear.

shop.headline: Resources built from the field, not the library.
shop.subhead: Every guide, SOP, and toolkit is drawn from real work across real farms — not assembled from secondary sources.
shop.course1Desc: Carrying capacity, FCR optimisation, water quality systems, disease risk, and harvest planning — built for vannamei and monodon operators. The same frameworks behind the $5,000 Diagnostic Audit, taught in full.
shop.course2Desc: Financial modelling, investor-readiness, cost structure, and strategic decision-making for aquaculture ventures at the $500K–$5M scale. The business layer of the 90-Day Transformation Programme, structured as a self-paced course.
shop.course3Desc: Design, evaluate, and operate IMTA, biofloc, and RAS systems — from engineering logic and biological principles to economic trade-offs. Systems design that underpins facilities worth $500K–$5M.
shop.emptyCategory: No products in this category yet. Check back soon.

productDetail.secureCheckout: Secure checkout via Lemon Squeezy. Instant PDF delivery. 30-day money-back guarantee.
productDetail.freeDelivery: Enter your email and it arrives in your inbox immediately. No payment required.

consultation.seoTitle: Book an Advisory Session — Hazem Shannak
consultation.seoDesc: A focused working session on your aquaculture operation. 30 or 60 minutes. Written action plan within 24 hours. No retainer.
consultation.headline: You're making expensive decisions about your operation without the right reference point. That ends here.
consultation.body1: A bad stocking call. A missed intervention window. A miscalculated investment. These aren't operator errors — they're information gaps. You made the best decision available with what you had. This session changes what you have. You bring the problem; we work through it with the same diagnostic rigour I apply on-site.
consultation.body2: This is a focused working session — not a sales call, not a taster. You bring the problem. We work through it with the same diagnostic rigour I apply on-site. You leave with a specific written action, not a general recommendation.
bullets: Diagnosing the specific bottleneck holding your operation below its yield potential
Feed conversion ratio — where the leakage is and how to close the gap
Water quality management and intervention timing
Production planning, stocking decisions, and harvest scheduling
Investor readiness — financials, documentation, and positioning
Evaluating a new site, species, or system before you commit capital
deliverables: A written summary of the key issues and decisions discussed
One clear action to implement in the next seven days
Delivered within 24 hours of the session
No retainer required. No upsell. Just the work.
consultation.goodToKnow: Sessions run via video call. I cover the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, and Europe regularly. If you're unsure whether your question fits, book and we'll figure it out together. The first few minutes are for scoping.

faqs.a: Come with one or two specific problems — not a general overview of your operation. The more focused your question, the more useful the session. If you have production data, financial snapshots, or a site layout, bring them. We work best from real numbers.

faqs.q: Which session is right for me?
faqs.a: Choose the 30-minute session if you have one clear, specific question and already understand your situation reasonably well. Choose the 60-minute session if you are dealing with a complex problem, making a significant investment decision, or want to work through multiple dimensions of your operation.

faqs.q: Do you work with all aquaculture species?
faqs.a: My practice covers five shrimp species: Litopenaeus vannamei (Pacific white shrimp), Penaeus monodon (giant tiger prawn), Fenneropenaeus indicus (Indian white prawn), Penaeus semisulcatus (green tiger prawn), and Macrobrachium rosenbergii (giant freshwater prawn). If your operation involves one of these, we are a direct fit.

faqs.q: What time zones do you cover?
faqs.a: I work regularly across the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Sub-Saharan Africa, and Europe. Sessions are scheduled via Calendly so you can find a slot that suits you.

You can reschedule up to 24 hours before the session with no charge. Cancellations inside 24 hours are non-refundable. If I need to cancel for any reason, you receive a full refund or a rescheduled slot — your choice.

faqs.q: Is this a one-off or part of an ongoing engagement?
faqs.a: This is a standalone session. Many clients return for follow-up sessions as their situation develops, but there is no commitment beyond the session you book.

deepDive.desc: Full diagnostic. Multiple dimensions. Best for complex decisions, site evaluations, or any situation where you need to work through more than one layer of the problem.
deepDive.tier1CreditNote: Book Tier 1 within 30 days of your session and the full session fee is credited toward your audit investment.

focus.desc: One specific question. One clear answer. One action. Best for operators who already understand their situation and need a sharp, experienced second opinion.
bullets: Targeted on a single problem or decision

consultation.rescheduleBody: Reschedule up to 24 hours before with no charge. Cancellations inside 24 hours are non-refundable.
consultation.bridgeText: Looking for more than a session?

about.headline: About Hazem
about.bio1: I know what it is to walk into a shrimp operation doing real revenue and feel the gap between what it should produce and what it does. The pond numbers look reasonable. The operator is working hard. But somewhere in the system, margin is bleeding through failures neither of you can see. Closing that gap — across shrimp operations, tilapia farms, and integrated systems in SE Asia, MENA, and Africa — is what I have spent 30 years doing.
about.bio2: My frameworks — the Blue Living Systems Framework, Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture (IMTA), and Regenerative Seawater Agriculture (RSA) — are not academic constructs. They are working models built from thousands of hours of farm observation, failure analysis, and system redesign.
about.bio3: The resources I sell are the distilled version of what I teach my highest-paying consulting clients. The same tools. The same frameworks. At a price that makes them accessible to operators who cannot yet afford to bring me on-site.
about.basedValue: Kafr ElSheikh, Egypt & Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
about.degree: B.Sc. Agricultural Engineering — Animal Production & Husbandry
about.softOfferHeadline: If this resonates, the fastest route forward is a conversation.
about.softOfferBody: Most operators who come to me have already tried fixing things from the inside. The Tier 1 Diagnostic Audit is where we start — 30 days, remote, specific dollar-figure leak identification and a prioritised action plan. Most operators find it recovers its cost within the first adjusted cycle. If you want to ask a question before booking, DM on LinkedIn.
about.softOfferAlt: Or book a one-hour consultation. Same depth, applied directly to your operation.

audit.seoTitle: Aquapreneur Transformation Programme — Consulting for Shrimp Farm Operators
audit.seoDesc: Three engagement levels for shrimp operators doing $200K–$2M/year in SE Asia and MENA. Diagnostic audit, 90-day margin transformation, or investor-ready exit program. Built on 30+ years of field experience.
audit.headline: Stop Bleeding Margin. Start Building a Farm Worth Something.
audit.heroBody: If your shrimp operation is doing real revenue but the margin keeps shrinking — you already know the problem is not the fish. It is the system. These three programmes are built for one type of operator: technically capable, commercially frustrated, and ready to fix it properly. Most operators in SE Asia and MENA come in at Tier 2. A few start with Tier 1. A small number are ready for Tier 3. The decision guide below will tell you which.
audit.heroFreeLink: Not sure which level? Score your farm first — it is free
audit.stickyTagline: Shrimp farm margin recovery and exit preparation.
audit.ladderQuote: Tier 1 gives you the map. Tier 2 executes the fix. Tier 3 builds the asset. You do not need all three — you need the one that matches where your shrimp operation is bleeding right now.
audit.planHeadline: Three steps from bleeding margin to a farm worth building.
audit.planStep1Body: Six questions. Two minutes. A personalised leak index across five operational categories — free, with no commitment required.
audit.planStep2Body: Tier 1 gives you the map. Tier 2 executes the fix with a guarantee. Tier 3 builds an investor-ready asset. The decision guide on this page tells you which one fits.
audit.planStep3Body: Every leak gets a dollar amount. Every fix gets a timeline. Tier 2 comes with a guaranteed 10-percentage-point margin improvement — or the final milestone is waived.
audit.socialProofLine2: Shrimp · Tilapia · IMTA — SE Asia · MENA · Africa
audit.upgradeHeadline: Each level builds on the last — and your investment carries forward.
audit.decisionHeadline: Pick the one that matches where your farm is right now.
audit.ebookBody: Before you invest in any level, read this. It maps every category of profit leak in a shrimp operation — feed waste, invisible mortality, energy drag, SOP gaps — with the diagnostic metrics that reveal them. If you are doing $200K–$2M/year in SE Asia or MENA and your margin is underperforming, this tells you exactly where to look.
audit.crossNavEyebrow: Not ready for an audit? Start here — all free
audit.finalCtaHeadline: Ready to stop guessing and start fixing?
audit.finalCtaBody: Send me your farm's monthly revenue, species, pond count, and your biggest current headache. I will tell you honestly which level fits — or whether you should start with the free audit guide first.
audit.socialProofLine2: Across 15 countries · $50M+ in farm value advised
audit.mathsBody1: If your farm does $50K/month at 12% margin ($6K/month), a 10-point improvement takes you to 22% ($11K/month). That's an extra
audit.mathsBody2: The program pays for itself in 3–5 months. After one year you are $60K ahead. The Operations Manual is yours forever — you can train staff with it, sell the farm with it.
audit.successFeeBody: Prefer to pay less upfront? $15K covers Phases 1–3, plus a 5% success fee on capital raised or sale price (capped at $50K). Ask me about this on the discovery call — it is only available to farms with a strong track record.
audit.t1Tagline: The map. You do the digging.
audit.t1PriceSub: Base $5,000. Adjusted for pond count, species, and data quality.
audit.t1BestFor: Operators who scored 11–15 on the audit. Decent operational discipline. Will execute a roadmap themselves if someone shows them exactly what to do.
audit.t1NotFor: Operators scoring 16+ (you need Tier 2 — you are bleeding too fast to fix it alone), or anyone who wants staff training and weekly calls.
audit.t1Promise: You will know exactly where your farm is leaking money. Every leak will have a dollar amount attached. You will have a ranked list of fixes, a 90-day action plan, and every template you need to execute on your own. I do not fix the leaks for you in Tier 1. I give you the map.
audit.t1Guarantee: Satisfaction guarantee: if after the kickoff call you have not received at least $5,000 of value, I refund 100%. Conditions apply — you must attempt three fixes and request the refund within 45 days.
audit.t1GuaranteeShort: Satisfaction guarantee: if after the kickoff call you have not received at least $5,000 of value, I refund 100%.
audit.t1Payment: 100% upfront. No milestones. I used to offer 50/50 — too many operators paid the first half, got the draft report, and disappeared. If you need two installments, 50% at signing and 50% before report delivery. No report goes out until paid in full.
audit.t1LeadTime: 2–3 weeks from contract signing to report delivery
audit.t1Availability: No application needed. Book directly and I send the data intake form.
audit.t1CtaNote: No application needed. Pay and I send the data intake form within 24 hours.
audit.t1P1Detail: You send production records for your last 3–6 batches, 12 months of electricity and feed invoices, water quality logs if you have them, and a 15-minute phone video walkthrough of every pond. I send you a shot list.
audit.t1P2Detail: I build a 20–30 variable model for your farm. Real FCR per batch, invisible mortality, energy cost per kg, carrying capacity utilisation, water exchange efficiency, treatment cost as % of revenue, and SOP gap score. Benchmark comparison against 50+ audited farms.
audit.t1P3Detail: Custom 30–40 page diagnostic report: executive summary (top 3 leaks + single highest-ROI fix), leak-by-leak breakdown with dollar gaps, ranked action plan with estimated costs and monthly savings, 90-day calendar, and 10+ pages of printable templates.
audit.t1P4Detail: Final report delivery. A 90-minute kickoff call where we walk every page. Then one 45-minute troubleshooting call, usable any time within 60 days — schedule it when you get stuck on a specific fix.
audit.t1Inc2: Real FCR, invisible mortality, and energy cost per kg from your actual data
audit.t1Inc3: Ranked list of 7 leaks with dollar values attached to each
audit.t1Inc4: 90-day action plan — what to fix, in what order, with what tool
audit.t1Inc5: 90-min kickoff call + one 45-min follow-up call (within 60 days)
audit.t1Inc6: PDF templates: feed tray log, mortality log, water quality log, DO log, batch FCR tracker
audit.t1Exc1: On-site visit — no travel, no farm walk
audit.t1Exc2: Staff training — the report is written for you to train them
audit.t1Exc3: Weekly accountability calls — you get two calls total
audit.t1Exc5: Margin improvement guarantee — satisfaction guarantee applies instead
audit.t2PriceSub: Single-species, single-site, under 10 ponds: $15K. 10–30 ponds: $20K. Multiple species or multiple sites: $25K. International travel: $25K + actuals.
audit.t2BestFor: Operators who scored 16+, or scored 11–15 but could not execute Tier 1 alone. Monthly revenue $30K–$150K. You need someone to hold your hand, train your crew, and guarantee the result.
audit.t2NotFor: Operators who want a report to put on a shelf. Farms already profitable and just wanting a tune-up. Anyone not willing to share their real numbers.
audit.t2Promise: In 90 days, I will increase your net operating margin by a minimum of 10 percentage points. If we fail, you do not pay the final milestone. This is not consulting. This is not coaching. This is a hands-on restructuring of your farm's operations — led by someone who has done it on three continents.
audit.t2Guarantee: 10-percentage-point margin improvement guarantee. Measured against Day 1 baseline. I only commit to operators where I can see the result before we begin — that is the filter, not the safety net. If the target is not met, Milestone 3 is waived. You keep every deliverable.
audit.t2GuaranteeShort: 10-point margin improvement, guaranteed. I only take on farms where I know I can deliver. If the target is not met, Milestone 3 is $0.
audit.t2Payment: 3 milestones: 33% at signing, 34% at start of Phase 2 (Day 30), 33% at end of Phase 3 — only if margin guarantee is met. If guarantee fails, Milestone 3 is $0.
audit.t2LeadTime: 4–6 weeks from signing to start. I block travel and prepare custom materials in advance.
audit.t2Availability: I take 3 operators per quarter. Q3 2026: 2 spots remaining. Q4 2026: 3 spots. Q1 2027: waitlist open.
audit.t2CtaNote: I review every application personally. If you are a fit, I send a calendar link for a 30-min discovery call.
audit.t2P1Detail: Remote data collection in Week 1. Baseline P&L analysis in Week 2 — real FCR, invisible mortality, carrying capacity per kg. Week 3: 5-day on-site immersion (shadow day, hands-on diagnostics, side-by-side trials, staff training workshops, SOP writing, Command Board installation). Week 4: Baseline report and signed Phase 2 action plan.
audit.t2P2Detail: Weekly 60-min accountability calls (same day, same time). Remote Wednesday log review — voice note within 24 hours if something is wrong. Day 45 mid-phase checkpoint. Systematic closure of the top leaks: FCR, invisible mortality, stocking density, water exchange, energy, disease prevention, SOPs.
audit.t2P3Detail: Second 3-day on-site visit at Week 9 (progress audit, retraining, handover session). Three final weekly calls where you lead. Day 90: margin measurement vs baseline. Delivery of Operations Manual (50–80 pages, printed and bound), digital dashboard, and 30-minute Farm in a Box video.
audit.t2Inc2: 5-day on-site immersion (travel included within your country)
audit.t2Inc3: Daily shadowing, hands-on diagnostics, aerator tests, side-by-side pond trials
audit.t2Inc4: Staff training workshops + SOP writing together on-site
audit.t2Inc5: Laminated Command Board for your feed shed (5 key metrics, updated daily)
audit.t2Inc7: Remote mid-week monitoring — Wednesday log review, text/voice note if something drifts
audit.t2Inc8: Second 3-day on-site visit at Week 9 to audit progress and retrain
audit.t2Inc9: Complete Operations Manual — 50–80 pages, custom to your farm, printed and bound
audit.t2Inc10: Digital dashboard (Google Sheets auto-calculates your margins from daily entries)
audit.t2Inc11: 30-min "Farm in a Box" video for your future manager or buyer
audit.t2Exc3: Ongoing support beyond 90 days (hourly aftercare at $400/hr available)
audit.t3Tagline: Raise capital. Sell the farm. Scale.
audit.t3PriceSub: Base $35K for a single-site farm with clean books. +$5K per additional site. +$10K if funding target exceeds $2M. −$5K if you have already completed Tier 2 with me.
audit.t3BestFor: Operations with $100K+/month revenue and 15%+ margins. Ready to raise $200K–$5M or sell within 12–24 months. Must have completed Tier 2 or demonstrate equivalent operational benchmark.
audit.t3NotFor: Operators who just want a prettier pitch deck. Farms with unresolved operational leaks. Anyone not ready to share full financials with potential investors.
audit.t3Promise: In 180 days, your farm will pass investor due diligence. You will have a business plan that raises money, a data room that answers every question before it is asked, and introductions to at least five pre-vetted capital sources. If no term sheet, LOI, or formal commitment arrives within 12 months of starting, I extend with six months of quarterly check-ins at no cost.
audit.t3Guarantee: Term sheet or LOI within 12 months of program start. If not, six months of free quarterly check-ins. Milestone 6 (10%) is waived if no deal closes.
audit.t3GuaranteeShort: Term sheet or LOI within 12 months of program start. If not, six months of free quarterly check-ins.
audit.t3Payment: 6 milestones: 20% at signing, 20% at Phase 2 start (Day 30), 20% at Phase 3 start (Day 60), 15% at Phase 4 start (Day 90), 15% at Phase 5 start (Day 120), 10% at Phase 6 start (Day 150) — waived if no term sheet or LOI within 12 months. Success fee alternative available.
audit.t3LeadTime: 4–6 weeks to start. Requires Tier 2 completion or proof your operations already run at benchmark.
audit.t3Availability: Application + 90-minute discovery call required. I will ask for your P&L on that call. Be ready.
audit.t3CtaNote: Application + 90-min discovery call required. Must have completed Tier 2 or equivalent.
audit.t3P1Detail: Financial deep dive (3 years of returns, 12 months of bank statements, real EBITDA calculation — most operators overestimate by 30–50%). Legal and compliance audit. 2-hour exit readiness call. Delivery of Go/No-Go report with valuation range (3–5× EBITDA). If No-Go: 75% refund of Phase 1 payment.
audit.t3P2Detail: 3-day on-site visit with an investor's eye — safety, cleanliness, data systems, staff competence. Fix-It List (10–20 action items, 10-day completion window). Full 3-year financial model (monthly P&L, cash flow, balance sheet, sensitivity analysis, use-of-funds table). Virtual data room setup.
audit.t3P3Detail: 30–40 page investor-grade business plan. 15–20 slide pitch deck. 2-page investor teaser (this is what you send cold — if they don't bite on the teaser, they won't read the deck).
audit.t3P4Detail: List of 50–100 targeted capital sources (family offices, impact investors, VCs, private debt, strategic buyers, government grants). At least 5–10 warm personal introductions. Cold outreach templates. Live pipeline tracker.
audit.t3P5Detail: Two recorded pitch rehearsals with written critique. Mock investor panel with 2–3 consultants asking the hard questions live. 80–100 item due diligence checklist. Final data room review (file naming, permissions, missing documents).
audit.t3P6Detail: Pre-meeting prep call before every investor meeting. 24-hour debrief after each meeting. Term sheet review (I flag what is standard and what is predatory — you take it to your lawyer). Extended 60 days at no cost if no term sheet by Week 26.
audit.t3Inc2: 3-year financial model (P&L, cash flow, balance sheet, sensitivity analysis)
audit.t3Inc8: 5–10 warm introductions from my personal network
audit.t3Inc9: 2 additional on-site visits (readiness assessment + investor walkthrough)
audit.t3Inc11: 4 quarterly check-in calls for 12 months after program end
audit.t3Exc1: Guaranteed funding — I do not control investors
audit.t3Exc2: Legal representation — you need your own lawyer for the term sheet
audit.t3Exc3: Ongoing CFO services after the program ends
audit.dec1Condition: Revenue $30K–$100K/month. Operations run but you cannot see where the margin goes. You will execute a roadmap if someone shows you exactly what to do.
audit.dec2Condition: Revenue $50K–$200K/month. You know the leaks exist but cannot close them alone. Your crew needs training. You need someone on the ground.
audit.dec3Condition: Revenue $100K+/month. Margins above 15%. Ready to raise $500K–$5M or exit within 18 months.
audit.dec4Condition: Revenue under $30K/month, or still battling survival rate and basic system stability
audit.dec4Tier: → Start with the free audit guide
audit.t1UpgradeCredit: 100% of this investment credited toward Tier 2 if you upgrade within 30 days of receiving your report.
audit.upg1Detail: If you buy Tier 1 and decide within 30 days of receiving the report that you want to upgrade, I credit 100% of what you paid toward Tier 2. You only pay the difference. The $5,000 is not lost — it becomes a down payment.
audit.upg2Detail: If you are in Tier 2 and realise you want to raise capital or sell, Tier 3 is a separate engagement. Because you already have the Operations Manual and the logs, I discount Tier 3 by $5,000.
audit.upg3Detail: Not recommended. You need the operational foundation first. If you insist, a Tier 2 diagnostic is included in the Tier 3 price. But I will not make investor introductions until the operations are clean.

tools.seoTitle: Free Diagnostic Tools — Farm Score, Benchmark, Valuation & AI
tools.seoDesc: Six free tools for aquaculture farm operators: Farm Health Diagnostic, Benchmark, Margin Recovery Calculator, Valuation Calculator, AI Symptom Checker, and Library AI Assistant.
tools.headline: Six tools. Free. No sign-up required.
tools.body: Built from 30 years of field work across 15 countries. Each gives you a specific output, not a vague overview. Start with the Farm Diagnostic if you're not sure where to begin.
tools.unlockResults: Complete the diagnostic to unlock your results
tools.fcrSurvivalNote: Combined FCR + survival improvement to benchmark.
tools.diagnosticDesc: Score your operation across Feed Efficiency, Survival, Operations, Financial Readiness, and Infrastructure. Get an estimated monthly revenue leak and a specific action plan. Benchmarks drawn from 50+ farms across 15 countries.
tools.benchmarkDesc: Enter three metrics and see in real time where your operation ranks against 50+ audited farms — percentile position and colour-coded status for each. The live preview uses FCR. The full tool covers all three metrics with the highest-ROI resource to close each gap.
tools.marginRecoveryDesc: A 0.2 improvement in FCR can recover hundreds of thousands in lost margin. Set your revenue and current FCR to see what's on the table.
tools.valuationDesc: Move the slider to your revenue. See your current investor valuation and the value the 90-Day Transformation Programme would unlock — using the same EBITDA-multiple methodology used in Tier 3 due diligence.
tools.valuationDesc2: The full tool includes margin, documentation quality, and years in operation.
tools.symptomCheckerDesc: Describe what's going wrong in one sentence. The AI returns the likely root cause, the one metric to measure, and a 48-hour action — trained on 30 years of field experience.
tools.aiAssistantDesc: Ask any question about shrimp production, water quality, feed management, biofloc systems, disease, or farm economics. Draws on Hazem's curated library of 35+ technical resources.
tools.needMoreBody: These tools surface what the problems are. The audit and consultation engagements fix them — with a guaranteed outcome on Tier 2.

library.seoTitle: Aquaculture Resources Library — Databases, Journals & Technical Guides
library.seoTitleAi: Ask the Aquaculture AI — Library Knowledge Assistant
library.seoDesc: A curated collection of the authoritative databases, journals, and technical guides that serious aquaculture operators actually use — plus an AI assistant trained on 30 years of field experience.
library.headline: The sources that matter in aquaculture
library.body: The databases, journals, standards bodies, and trade publications serious operators actually use — plus an AI trained on them.
library.noResults: No resources in this category yet.
library.ctaTitle: Need a diagnosis, not just a reading list?
library.ctaBody: The resources here will build your knowledge. A one-hour consultation applies that knowledge directly to your operation.
library.aiContextNote: Draws on 35 curated technical resources and 30 years of field experience across vannamei, monodon, and freshwater prawn systems. Ask about water quality, FCR, disease, biofloc, farm economics, or certifications.
library.aiFollowUp3: How does this apply to biofloc?
library.aiPlaceholder: Ask about water quality, FCR, disease, biofloc, farm economics…
library.aiPressEnter: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
library.apiKeyError: Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to your Vercel environment variables.
library.aiBody: Trained on 35+ curated resources and 30 years of field experience.

diagnostic.introBody: 34 questions. 8 categories. Know exactly where your farm is losing money.
diagnostic.contextBody: These shape how your results are scored — the benchmarks differ by species and system.
diagnostic.question: Question {{current}} of {{total}}

benchmark.seoTitle: Benchmark My Farm — How Do You Compare?
benchmark.seoDesc: Enter your FCR, survival rate, cost per kg, stocking density, DO, and energy cost. See exactly where your farm ranks against 50+ audited operations.
benchmark.headline: How does your farm compare?
benchmark.body: Move the sliders to match your current metrics. See in real time where you rank against the 50+ farms in our audit database.
benchmark.weakestMetricPost: . This is where the highest-ROI intervention lives.
benchmark.overallAbove: Your farm is performing above the industry median.
benchmark.overallNear: Your farm is tracking near the industry average.
benchmark.overallBelow: Your farm is underperforming the benchmark on key metrics.

valuation.seoTitle: Farm Valuation Calculator — What Is Your Farm Worth?
valuation.seoDesc: Enter your revenue, margin, documentation, species model, and certifications. See your farm's current investor valuation and its potential value after the 90-Day Transformation Programme.
valuation.headline: What is your farm worth?
valuation.body: Six inputs. See your current investor valuation and the value the 90-Day Transformation Programme would unlock. Based on the same EBITDA-multiple methodology used in Tier 3 due diligence work.
valuation.cardCurrentNote: At {{multiple}}× EBITDA — based on documentation, tenure, species model, and certification profile.
valuation.revealedText: The {{uplift}} uplift assumes a guaranteed 10-percentage-point margin improvement (Tier 2 guarantee) plus improved documentation commanding a higher multiple in investor conversations.
valuation.talkFirstBtn: Talk it through first — Book a Call
valuation.disclaimer: Indicative only. Actual valuations depend on verified financials, market conditions, buyer profile, and asset quality. The 10pp margin improvement reflects the Tier 2 contractual guarantee, not a projection. IMTA and international certification multiples are based on Hazem's deal exposure across the Middle East and Southeast Asia.
valuation.crossLink1Sub: Get your full health score first
valuation.crossLink3Sub: Describe a specific problem for a free diagnosis

symptomChecker.headline: Describe what's going wrong.
symptomChecker.body: One sentence. The AI — trained on Hazem's 30 years of field experience — will identify the likely root cause, the one metric to measure to confirm it, and the one action to take in the next 48 hours.
symptomChecker.placeholder: e.g. Survival dropped from 80% to 58% with no disease signs, FCR climbing, and morning DO readings consistently low…
symptomChecker.analysingMsg: Analysing against 30 years of field patterns…
symptomChecker.apiKeyError: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in your Vercel environment variables to activate this tool.
symptomChecker.crossLink3Sub: What is your farm worth today?

askPage.placeholder: Ask about FCR, water quality, IMTA, biofloc, stocking decisions…

bookConsultation.headline: Choose your time slot.
bookConsultation.body: Pick a date and time that works for you. You'll receive a confirmation email with the video call link immediately after booking.
bookConsultation.socialProof2: Across 15 countries · $50M+ in farm value advised
bookConsultation.step01Detail: Choose the slot that suits you. A calendar invite lands in your inbox immediately.
bookConsultation.step02Detail: Bring your most pressing operational or investment question. Real numbers if you have them.
bookConsultation.step03Detail: A focused 60 minutes. You leave with a specific action, not a vague recommendation.

notFound.headline: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

free-biofloc-guide.title: 10 Ways to Ruin a Biofloc System
free-biofloc-guide.tagline: The failure modes that kill BFT cycles — mapped so you can avoid every one.
free-biofloc-guide.description: Most biofloc failures follow the same patterns. This guide documents the ten most common errors — oxygen crashes, C:N imbalances, floc collapse, stocking mistakes — so you can diagnose problems before they cost you a production cycle.
benefits: Recognise early warning signs of floc collapse before it's too late
Understand the C:N ratio errors that kill aeration efficiency
Avoid the stocking density traps that compound every other mistake
Use the failure framework as a diagnostic checklist for your current system

profit-leak-audit.title: Aquaculture Profit Leak Audit
profit-leak-audit.tagline: Find and fix the hidden losses draining your farm — in a single day.
profit-leak-audit.description: Most shrimp farms lose 20–35% of potential profit through leaks that never show up on a standard P&L. This audit framework walks you through the seven most common sources of hidden loss — feed waste, FCR drift, undetected mortality, aeration inefficiency, harvest timing errors, pricing gaps, and working capital drag — with a scored diagnostic tool you can complete in a single day.
benefits: Identify hidden profit leaks across all seven loss categories in one structured audit
Score your operation against field benchmarks from intensive shrimp systems
Rank your fixes by financial impact — highest return first
Use the diagnostic as a repeatable quarterly review tool

shrimp-imta-primer.title: The Shrimp IMTA Primer
shrimp-imta-primer.tagline: Three crops, one pond, better margins — the case for IMTA in 15 minutes.
shrimp-imta-primer.description: Most shrimp farms run one crop on water that could be running three. This primer explains Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture — what it is, what the economics look like, and what it takes to start. Backed by field data from Brazil, India, Nigeria, Kenya, and Vietnam.
benefits: Understand why the IMTA margin case holds across tropical shrimp systems worldwide
See real BCR and net income figures from peer-reviewed commercial trials
Learn the three trophic levels every IMTA system needs — and what happens when you skip one
Get a clear picture of conversion costs, payback periods, and first-cycle yield expectations
Know exactly what the first 90 days of conversion look like — day by day

free-7-strategies.title: 7 Strategies for Waste-Free Shrimp Farming
free-7-strategies.tagline: Proven frameworks for sustainable, low-waste shrimp production.
free-7-strategies.description: Field-tested across Southeast Asia and the Middle East. This guide covers feed waste reduction, effluent management, and building an operation that survives tightening export regulations — all grounded in 30 years of hands-on practice.
benefits: Reduce feed waste and close the gap on your FCR immediately
Build effluent management systems that satisfy export buyers
Apply circular waste-to-resource loops inside your pond system
Position your operation for markets where sustainability is a prerequisite

caseStudies.headline: Problems diagnosed. Margins recovered.
caseStudies.body: These are representative engagements from the past decade. Client names and locations are anonymised at request. The numbers are real.
caseStudies.ctaTitle: Recognise your operation in one of these?

courses.body: These programmes are in development. Each one packages the diagnostic frameworks, operational systems, and business logic I use with clients — built for farm operators, technical managers, and investors who want depth, not surface-level content.

newsletter.headline: Aquaculture: The Last Frontier
newsletter.body: A newsletter on aquaculture business, sustainability, and systems thinking — written from 30 years of field experience across 15 countries. No theory without practice. No opinion without evidence.

diagnostic.seoTitle: Shrimp Farm Profit Leak Diagnostic — Free Tool
diagnostic.seoDesc: 34-question species-weighted diagnostic across 8 categories. Identify exactly where your shrimp farm is losing money.
diagnostic.introHeadline: Where is your farm leaking profit?
diagnostic.introBody1: A 34-question profit leak diagnostic across 8 operational categories — feed efficiency, disease pressure, water quality, infrastructure, financial visibility, and more.
diagnostic.introBody2: Scoring is weighted by species and production system. A 1.7 FCR on vannamei in a lined pond carries a different weight than the same number on monodon in an earthen pond. This tool knows the difference.
diagnostic.introCredibility: Based on 30+ years of field data across 15 countries
diagnostic.topCategoriesNote: ▲ marks your top 3 leak categories by estimated dollar impact
diagnostic.saveResultsBody: Enter your email to access these results later and track your improvement over time.
diagnostic.resultsSaved: Results saved! You can return anytime using that email.
diagnostic.crossLink1Sub: See where you rank against audited farms
diagnostic.crossLink2Sub: What is your farm worth to an investor today?
diagnostic.crossLink3Sub: Describe a problem for an instant diagnosis
diagnostic.disclaimer: Results are indicative. Farm context, market conditions, and cycle history all affect actual performance. For a full audit with dollar-precise leak identification, book a consultation.
